steps.title: Identify the central figure
steps.content: The passage introduces Barton Williams as instrumental in helping Black women establish themselves in the North. It then explains why many women sought better opportunities and how she helped by securing job placements.

steps.title: Reject unsupported scopes
steps.content: B adds professional connections and jobs with the Chicago Defender, neither of which the text states. C shifts to causes of the Great Migration's start. D turns background about employment challenges into the main purpose. The text's purpose is to introduce and illustrate Barton Williams's support during migration. The answer is A.
